title: lobelia strictiflora
intro: Lobelia strictiflora, also known as Lobelia, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Campanulaceae family. It is native to China and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Lobelia strictiflora include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, relieve respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis, and improve circulation. Lobelia strictiflora can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
